erp-v2-ui-first.title: ESSENCE Hub System — ERP v2, UI-First Rebuild (design system + mockups ก่อน แล้วค่อย implement)

gate1_look.note: Gate 1 round 4 OPEN for Pond (2026-07-09). Round 4 mockups (28 pages) + round 4.5 data-embed complete. PO independent cross-page consistency check = PASS. Docs for Pond: po-mockup-review-r4.md §7 (10-min guide), mock-data-journeys.md (per-use-case walkthrough), entity-status-map.md (authoritative entity/status/cascade incl PRD). Prior: R1 theme A; R2 13-cat closed R3; R3 4 PO-analysis + create pages R4; Batch B-{PO}-{line}-{run} + rework loop confirmed.

gate2_requirements.note: Stage 2: PO+BA+Tech-Lead — ปอนด์อนุมัติ requirements + NFR; ถ้า UI ขาด/flow ไม่ครบ วนกลับ UX/UI แบบ incremental

gate3_app_review.note: Stage 3 จบ: PO/BA/UX-UI เล่นแอปจริงแล้วสรุปให้ปอนด์อนุมัติ (Test Env: local PC)

gate4_deploy.note: Stage 4: DevOps deploy GCP + QA sanity test ส่งผลให้ปอนด์

overrides.reason: ปอนด์สั่ง flow ใหม่: UX/UI + PO ทำ design phase คู่กัน (แก้จากเดิมที่ข้าม po ด้วย) — functional scope อ้างอิง prototype-v1

gate_checklist.item: Business problem concrete + measurable BKVs + Gate1 criteria + scope + DoD

questions_for_pond.q: ยืนยัน Tier 1 / เป้าเวลา BKV-1 / เกณฑ์ UAT BKV-5
questions_for_pond.answer: Tier1 ยืนยัน; BKV-1 เชิงคุณภาพ ลดคลิก; BKV-5 Function 0 defect + UX>=3.5 (2026-07-08)

history.summary: Wrote v2 design-brief tied to the real 10 prototype feedback points; 5 measurable BKVs; questions batched.

gate_checklist.item: Design system + 17 self-contained mockups + 3 theme options; fixes 10 prototype complaints; Playwright-verified

questions_for_pond.q: theme / logo / company info / density
questions_for_pond.answer: A Clean Clinical teal อนุมัติ; placeholder logo; Admin กรอกบริษัท; 40px (2026-07-08)

history.summary: Delivered v2 design system + 17 clickable mockups + theme options. Set WAITING_HUMAN_GATE.

gate_checklist.item: Gate1 r1 feedback absorbed; status-journeys.md (7 machines + 14-row continuity + RUCDAA); notification/deep-link; 6 rules confirmed

questions_for_pond.q: 6 business rules (material shortage, low-stock default, DN partial, PO reject, RUCDAA, invoice stage)
questions_for_pond.answer: warning-not-block; no default; Partially Delivered; Ready+Sale; RUCDAA Admin; from Confirmed (2026-07-08) — folded

history.summary: Authored status-journeys.md + folded 6 Pond confirmations + Notification/Inbox + status-summary-for-pond.md. READY_FOR_UXUI.

gate_checklist.item: Rebranded ESSENCE Hub; 23 mockups + index; responsive; covered Gate1 r1 + 6 corrections; RUCDAA; Thai tax invoice

questions_for_pond.q: logo placeholder / click budget / customer cycle / completeness
questions_for_pond.answer: placeholder ok; ≤10/≤6; 3 เดือน; PO review completeness (2026-07-08)

history.summary: Round-2 rebuild. 23 mockups + index. NOTE: built before Pond's round-2 feedback -> superseded by po-mockup-review round-3 list.

gate_checklist.item: Gate1 r2 (13 categories) absorbed; journeys updated (Production QC/Hold, PO cancel/reopen, Customer 6-status, 2-tier Shipment/DN, PR direct, BOM snapshot); full mockup review + P0/P1/P2 list

questions_for_pond.q: 5 flow: Follow-up status, PO reopen number, Hold edit scope, BOM snapshot, DN structure
questions_for_pond.answer: 6th status; keep number; edit all+trace; snapshot+badge; 2-tier Shipment/DN DN=1 PO (2026-07-08) — folded

history.summary: Folded Pond's 5 flow answers. Customer Follow-up=6th real status; Delivery=2-tier Shipment->DN. Updated brief + journeys. READY_FOR_UXUI for round-3.

gate_checklist.item: Read all Stage 2 inputs (directives, brief, status-journeys, Gate1 r1+r2 feedback, ADR-000, mockups, status.json)
PREP ROUND ONLY — no ADR/design/schema/API written yet (Pond's iron rule)
Stage 2 design plan drafted mentally (Security / API Spec / DB Schema) covering all cases

Technical risks / hard cases identified (field-level audit, PO reopen keeps number + audit chain, stock-cut concurrency DEF-09, BOM snapshot, 2-tier shipment reconcile, notification fan-out by Read-bit)
Open NFR/business questions batched for Pond (Thai)
Did NOT touch feature-level current_agent/status

questions_for_pond.q: เป้าหมาย performance ของหน้าจอหลัก?
options: < 2 วิ / trace < 5 วิ (แนะนำ)
questions_for_pond.answer: ทำ index ดีๆ แล้วอยากให้ <2 วิ — ห้ามเกิน 3 วิ (hard limit) (ปอนด์ตอบ 2026-07-08)

questions_for_pond.q: จำนวนผู้ใช้พร้อมกันสูงสุด Phase 2?
questions_for_pond.answer: สูงสุด 50 คนพร้อมกัน (ปอนด์ตอบ 2026-07-08)

questions_for_pond.q: ปริมาณข้อมูลต่อวัน?
questions_for_pond.answer: >200 PO/วัน และ Goods Receipt >50/วัน (โหลดสูง) (ปอนด์ตอบ 2026-07-08)

questions_for_pond.q: Retention ของ field-level audit?
questions_for_pond.answer: online 1 ปี หลังจากนั้น Super User manual purge/archive — ไม่มี auto-purge (ปอนด์ตอบ 2026-07-08)

questions_for_pond.q: นโยบาย backup/กู้คืน?
options: รายวัน 7–30 วัน
+สำเนานอกเครื่อง
ยังไม่ต้อง
questions_for_pond.answer: ขึ้น GCP — ใช้ Cloud SQL backup ทุกวัน ไม่ต้องสำเนานอกเครื่อง (ปอนด์ตอบ 2026-07-08)

questions_for_pond.q: Authentication?
questions_for_pond.answer: สร้าง account เอง (MySQL) + รองรับ Google Login — ผูก user ในหน้า admin (ปอนด์ตอบ 2026-07-08)

questions_for_pond.q: นโยบายรหัสผ่าน/session?
questions_for_pond.answer: พื้นฐาน — session expire 24 ชม. + ทุกเช้า 06:00 reset session ทั้งหมด (ปอนด์ตอบ 2026-07-08)

questions_for_pond.q: Timezone/วันที่?
options: UTC เก็บ + พ.ศ. แสดง
questions_for_pond.answer: Asia/Bangkok + พ.ศ. บนเอกสาร — เก็บ UTC แสดงเวลาไทย (ปอนด์ตอบ 2026-07-08)

questions_for_pond.q: เลขเอกสาร gapless?
options: gapless ต่อปี/เดือน
questions_for_pond.answer: ต้อง gapless ต่อปี/เดือน (เข้มตามสรรพากร) (ปอนด์ตอบ 2026-07-08)

history.summary: STAGE 2 PREP (understand + ask only, per Pond's iron rule — no ADR/design/schema/API written). Read all inputs. Produced a Stage-2 design plan + technical risk register + effort estimate. Batched 9 NFR/business questions for Pond (now answered). Deferred until Gate 1. Did NOT modify feature-level status.

gate_checklist.item: P0-1 Production flow fixed: รับงาน→กำลังผลิต→QC→พร้อมส่งมอบ; changer QC/QC-fail loop/Hold
P0-2 Removed 'รอวัตถุดิบ' everywhere
P0-3 Supplier: goods-receipt form removed (moved to stock)
P0-4 po-detail: cancel + reopen same number + Hold edit PO + trace

P1-5..14 goods-receipt full screen; supplier active/inactive+price matrix; customer 6th status; PR direct; dashboard drill-down+auto-15s; BOM snapshot+badge; trace field-audit; settings 5 tabs; shipping Shipment; po-list 3-date
P2-15..20 notification panel; home dedupe; QC batch-fail loop; VAT effective; pagination; index+goods-receipt
Pond's 5 answers embedded; responsive re-verified

history.summary: Round-3 incremental rework. Applied all P0/P1/P2 + 13 หมวด of r2 feedback + 5 Pond answers. Production ...→QC→พร้อมส่งมอบ; Customer 6th status; PO cancel+reopen same number; Shipment→1 DN/order; Goods Receipt; Supplier active/inactive+price matrix; BOM snapshot+badge; Trace field-audit; Settings 5 tabs; Dashboard auto-15s+drill-down; Notification panel. 24 pages+index. Verified via Playwright. Handoff READY_FOR_PO_REVIEW.

gate_checklist.item: Read all Stage-2 inputs (stage2-directives, brief, status-journeys, Gate1 r1+r2 feedback, po-mockup-review, mockups, status.json)
Confirmed round-3 mockups reflect revised flows — usable as spec
Stage-2 work plan: 16 epics + story<->mockup<->journey<->continuity mapping + Given/When/Then AC (happy+edge+error incl trace/notification/mandatory-comment)
Exception/edge inventory (30 cases)
No deliverable authored (stories.md held until Gate 1)
Open business rules for measurable AC batched to Pond (no rule invented)
gate_checklist.missing: answered by Pond (partial-GR, auto-PR qty, BOM no-active-supplier, VAT-by-date, credit-term, doc-numbering)

questions_for_pond.q: Goods Receipt รับน้อยกว่า PR (partial) → PR สถานะใด?
options: Open/รับบางส่วน จนครบ
ครบทันทีครั้งแรก
เพิ่มสถานะรับบางส่วน
questions_for_pond.answer: partial: ส่วนที่ขาด = สร้าง PR ใบใหม่แยก (ใบเดิมปิดตามของที่รับ); ผูก PR↔PO↔Lot (ปอนด์ตอบ 2026-07-08)

questions_for_pond.q: auto-PR จาก PO วัตถุดิบขาด — จำนวน + dedupe?
options: ส่วนที่ขาด รวมกับ PR ค้าง
ส่วนที่ขาด สร้างใบใหม่แยก
เต็ม + ใหม่แยก
questions_for_pond.answer: จำนวน = ส่วนที่ขาด + สร้างใบใหม่แยกทุกครั้ง (ผูก PR↔PO) (ปอนด์ตอบ 2026-07-08)

questions_for_pond.q: BOM component ไม่มี supplier active — ราคาทุน?
options: บล็อกจนกรอก override
ใช้เฉพาะ override
questions_for_pond.answer: บล็อกจนกรอก override (ปอนด์ตอบ 2026-07-08)

questions_for_pond.q: VAT rate ตาม effective date ยึดวันใด?
questions_for_pond.answer: invoice date (ปอนด์ตอบ 2026-07-08)

questions_for_pond.q: overdue ใช้เครดิตจากที่ใด?
options: ระดับลูกค้า + แก้ต่อใบ
ต่อใบเท่านั้น
questions_for_pond.answer: เครดิตระดับลูกค้า (default) + แก้ต่อใบได้ (ปอนด์ตอบ 2026-07-08)

questions_for_pond.q: รูปแบบเลขเอกสาร?
options: ปอนด์กำหนดเอง
questions_for_pond.answer: prefix+ปี+running + Lot prefix ต่อ supplier + gapless ต่อปี/เดือน (ปอนด์ตอบ 2026-07-08)

history.summary: STAGE 2 PREP ONLY. Verified round-3 mockups usable as spec. 16 epics + mapping + Given/When/Then AC + 30-case exception inventory. Batched 6 business rules to Pond (now answered). Did NOT touch feature-level status.

gate_checklist.item: Read pond-gate1-r3-feedback.md; 4 PO-analysis (🔍PO) items answered with proposals + defaults

🔍1 Dashboard date-filter per-tile semantics (§12); 🔍2 GR multi-line + many-PR (§5); 🔍3 QC per-line rework only failed line, QC on QC page only (§3.2); 🔍4 Batch at 'เริ่มผลิต' 1 line=1 Batch, GMP chain (§3.1)
Other r3 folded: PO status-change UI; real create pages; shipment round data; duplicate-label scan; realistic test data; searchable dropdowns; supplier layout
brief.md + status-journeys.md + po-mockup-review.md §8 round-4 action list updated
5 confirm questions to Pond with defaults (not blocking)

questions_for_pond.q: QC ราย line: ตีกลับแบบไหน?
options: [DEFAULT] เฉพาะ line/Batch ที่เสีย
questions_for_pond.answer: ตีกลับเฉพาะ line/Batch ที่เสีย (practical) — แต่ UI ต้องไม่ทำให้ฝ่ายผลิตงง (ปอนด์ตอบ 2026-07-08)

questions_for_pond.q: เลข Batch granularity?
questions_for_pond.answer: ใช้ Batch แยก (GMP) รูปแบบ B-{PO}-{line}-{run} — rework=Batch ใหม่, กันฝ่ายผลิตงง + ส่งกลับ QC ลื่น (ปอนด์ตอบ 2026-07-08)

questions_for_pond.q: Dashboard filter default + ตีความ?
options: [DEFAULT] เดือนนี้ + event/state + caption
questions_for_pond.answer: เดือนนี้ + event/state + เลือกอิสระ เดือน/ปี/date range (ปอนด์ตอบ 2026-07-08)

questions_for_pond.q: GR/PR ความสัมพันธ์?
options: [DEFAULT] 1 GR หลาย PR + partial
questions_for_pond.answer: 1 GR หลาย PR; รับไม่ครบ → สร้าง PR ใหม่เฉพาะที่ขาด + user review ก่อน (ปอนด์ตอบ 2026-07-08)

questions_for_pond.q: BOM ไม่มี supplier active?
options: บล็อกจนกรอก override
questions_for_pond.answer: บล็อกจนกรอก override (ปอนด์ตอบ 2026-07-08)

history.summary: Absorbed Gate-1 round-3 feedback. Analyzed 4 🔍PO items → status-journeys.md §3.1 (Batch B-{PO}-{line}-{run}), §3.2 (QC per-line rework loop), §5 (GR multi-line + partial→PR-review), §12 (dashboard date-filter event/state). Folded other r3 items (PO status-change UI, real create pages, shipment round data, duplicate-label scan, realistic data, searchable dropdowns, supplier layout). Updated brief.md + po-mockup-review.md §8. Batched 5 confirm questions (now answered by Pond incl Batch format B-{PO}-{line}-{run}). Handoff READY_FOR_UXUI for round-4.

gate_checklist.item: P0-1 production.html: removed 'QC ไม่ผ่าน' from status changer (เริ่มผลิต/ส่งตรวจ QC/พักงาน); QC on QC page only
P0-2 qc.html: decide per line/Batch; fail reworks ONLY that Batch + mandatory feedback; PO Ready when all lines pass; PO<->Batch<->Lot table
P0-3 Batch B-{PO}-{line}-{run} across production/qc/po-detail/trace; rework badge + previous-run history + QC feedback inline
P0-4 Real CREATE pages (create != edit): customer-create, contact-create, supplier create-mode, pr-create, bom-create, shipping create-round
P1-5 goods-receipt multi-line; 1 GR many PR; partial → confirm-dialog สร้าง PR ใหม่
P1-6 dashboard date-filter presets (default เดือนนี้ + free month/year/range) + per-tile event/state caption
P1-7 shipping 2-way create + round fields คนขับ/เบอร์/Route/ประเภทรถ
P1-8 supplier full-width layout (retired right panel) + real add-Supplier create mode
P1-9 po-detail 'เปลี่ยนสถานะ PO' card + per-line Batch/QC reconcile
P2 duplicate-label scan all pages (breadcrumb + single h1); realistic linked test data; searchable dropdowns everywhere
Pond's latest answers folded (Batch format; rework clarity; QC only failed line; GR partial→dialog; BOM block); index + design-system ADDENDUM R4
Playwright-verified at desktop/tablet/mobile with interaction checks; screenshots in ux-audit/; incremental only (ADR-008 respected)

history.summary: Round-4 incremental rework (theme/design-system locked). Closed all PO §8 P0/P1/P2 + folded Pond's answers (Batch B-{PO}-{line}-{run}; rework loop unambiguous; QC returns only failed line; GR partial→review dialog; BOM no-active-supplier→BLOCK). production drops 'QC ไม่ผ่าน' + Batch per line + Rework badge/feedback; QC decides per line/Batch with PO<->Batch<->Lot GMP chain + previous-run history; po-detail status-change card + per-line reconcile. NEW create pages (create≠edit). Goods-receipt multi-line + partial dialog. Dashboard date-filter + event/state captions. Supplier full-width layout. Removed duplicate title on every page. Realistic linked test data. Searchable dropdowns. 28 pages+index; design-system ADDENDUM R4. Playwright-verified desktop/tablet/mobile. Handoff READY_FOR_PO_REVIEW.

gate_checklist.item: Round-4 mockup review = PASS: all PO §8 P0/P1/P2 verified closed (deep-read production/qc/po-detail/goods-receipt/supplier/dashboard/customer-create + grep across 28)
Pond r3 9 categories all satisfied
Batch format B-{PO}-{line}-{run} + rework loop (ก-ง) verified vs journeys §3.1/§3.2
GMP chain visible; Follow-up↔Hold link; Shipment/DN reconcile present
mock-data-spec.md FINALIZED to real round-4 numbering — single dataset, 8 use cases, screen↔data table
po-mockup-review-r4.md written; remaining = round 4.5 data-embed

history.summary: TWO TASKS DONE. (1) Round-4 mockup review = PASS. (2) FINALIZED mock-data-spec.md to real numbering: one dataset (3 suppliers/1 inactive, 8 materials+lots, 4 BOM, 7 customers=6 statuses, PR/GR multi-line+partial) → 8 production use cases (UC1 Draft PO-191, UC2 Hold→Follow-up PO-188, UC3 QC-pass PO-176, UC4 rework-in-progress PO-181, UC5 rework-complete PO-170, UC6 single ship SHP-0044→DN-119→INV-135, UC7 full round SHP-0045, UC8 partial round SHP-0046) + screen↔data table + consistency checklist. Remaining = round 4.5 data-embed. Set READY_FOR_UXUI.

gate_checklist.item: Embedded central dataset (mock-data-spec.md) replacing per-page samples — same data visible across modules
PO-202607-000181 (เดอร์มา, line2 rework run1→run2) consistent across po-list / po-detail / production / qc / trace
เดอร์มา แคร์ = Follow-up (from PO-188 Hold) consistent across customers / customer-detail / dashboard tile + trace audit
SHP-20260708-0046 Partially consistent across shipping / delivery-note (DN-122/123/124); PO-175/178 match po-list + home
GR-20260708-008 partial (200/250 → dialog PR-000032) consistent across goods-receipt / purchase-request / stock / qc
8 use cases present; po-list shows all 11 dataset POs; 7 customers = all 6 statuses
Shared notification panel rewritten (all 25 shell pages) to dataset; UTF-8 clean (fixed a perl double-encode)
trace genealogy = B-PO-202607-000170-1-2 (run1 fail→run2 pass) + field-audit; INV-2026-000135 (PO-176) consistent
Data-only changes — no structure/layout touched; Playwright spot-check OK, 0 JS errors, noti encoding correct

history.summary: Round 4.5 (data embed only — no structure/layout changes). Replaced every page's sample data with the single central dataset from mock-data-spec.md. Key threads wired end-to-end (PO-181 rework; เดอร์มา=Follow-up↔PO-188 Hold; SHP-0046 Partially; GR-008 partial→PR-032). po-list = 11 dataset POs; customers = 7 (all 6 statuses); INV-135 for PO-176; trace = PO-170 run1-fail→run2-pass. Rewrote shared notification panel on all 25 shell pages (fixed a perl double-encode). Consistency checklist all pass. Handoff READY_FOR_PO_REVIEW.

Thread เดอร์มา=Follow-up↔PO-188 Hold consistent: customers row (badge+reason 'PO-202607-000188 Hold') + customer-detail + dashboard tile + po-list PO-188 Hold
Thread SHP-20260708-0046 Partially consistent: delivery-note DN-122 Delivered/DN-123 Rejected→raise Sale/DN-124 Postponed 10/07 + po-list PO-175 rejected-back-to-queue & PO-178 Postpone 10/07

history.summary: FINAL CROSS-PAGE DATA CHECK before Gate 1 round 4 — VERDICT PASS. Verified 6 checkpoints against mock-data-spec.md (PO-181 rework; เดอร์มา Follow-up↔PO-188 Hold; SHP-0046 Partially; GR-008→PR-032; 11 POs + INV-135↔PO-176 + formats; 7 customers=6 statuses + encoding). No inconsistencies. Wrote po-mockup-review-r4.md §6+§7 (10-min Pond guide) + mock-data-journeys.md (per-use-case walkthrough). Feature-level status unchanged (Gate 1 round 4 open).

gate_checklist.item: Answered Pond's 4 lifecycle questions: (1) PO Confirmed → auto-create PRD 'รับงาน' per line (production doesn't press accept); (2) PRD created at Confirm, 1 line=1 PRD, PRD-{YYYYMM}-{NNNNNN}; (3) Batch created at 'เริ่มผลิต', drives PRD→PO status; (4) 'ส่งตรวจ QC' does NOT create Batch (Batch created at เริ่มผลิต)
Defined PRD (ใบสั่งผลิต) as a distinct entity (was not separated from PO/Batch before) with own statuses + numbering; relationship 1 PO : N PRD (N=line) : M Batch (M≥N, +1/rework)

entity-status-map.md written: 11 entities (Customer, PO fulfilment+billing, PRD, Batch, Lot, PR, GR, Shipment, DN, Invoice) each with own statuses + who-changes (role) + which mockup page + doc-number format + when-created
Cascade table (17 rows) X changes → Y changes → shown on page → notification; + single-line text diagram customer→PO→PRD→Batch→QC→Shipment/DN→Invoice→Paid
Checked mockups vs definition: PRD auto-on-confirm + 1 line=1 PRD + Batch-at-เริ่มผลิต already MATCH; 2 fixes for UX (PRD numbering PRD-000091→PRD-{YYYYMM}-{NNNNNN}; po-detail show PRD per line)
Synced status-journeys.md §3 to name PRD + relationship + pointer to entity-status-map.md (single source, no 2 truths)
3 lifecycle questions to Pond with defaults (PRD auto vs manual-accept; 1 line=1 PRD; PRD created despite material shortage) — not blocking

questions_for_pond.q: PRD 'รับงาน' auto ตอน PO Confirmed หรือให้ฝ่ายผลิตกดรับเอง?
options: [DEFAULT] auto (ผลิตแค่กด 'เริ่มผลิต' เมื่อพร้อม)
ฝ่ายผลิตกด 'รับงาน' ยืนยันเองก่อน

questions_for_pond.q: PRD granularity
PO Confirmed ทั้งที่วัตถุดิบขาด → สร้าง PRD ไหม?
options: [DEFAULT] สร้าง (ผลิตรอวัตถุดิบก่อนกดเริ่มผลิต)
ไม่สร้างจนวัตถุดิบพร้อม

history.summary: Answered Pond's 4 lifecycle questions + wrote entity-status-map.md (the 'one map to rule them all' Pond asked for). KEY: formally defined PRD (ใบสั่งผลิต / Production Order) as a distinct entity — the mockups already use PRD per line (PRD-000091=line1, PRD-000088=line2 of PO-181, auto-created on PO Confirm) but status-journeys hadn't named it. ANSWERS: (1) create non-draft PO = 'ยืนยันแล้ว (Confirmed)'; sending to production is AUTOMATIC — system auto-creates PRD per line at status 'รับงาน' (production does NOT press accept, just presses 'เริ่มผลิต' when ready) [default, confirm]; (2) PRD number created at PO Confirmed, 1 line item = 1 PRD, format PRD-{YYYYMM}-{NNNNNN}; (3) Batch created when production presses 'เริ่มผลิต' — Batch(กำลังผลิต)→PRD(กำลังผลิต); Batch QC-pass→PRD line ready; all PRD ready→PO Ready-to-Deliver; Batch QC-fail→PRD Rework + gen next Batch run; (4) NO — 'ส่งตรวจ QC' only changes the EXISTING Batch (กำลังผลิต→รอ QC); Batch is created once per run at 'เริ่มผลิต' (+new run only on rework), NOT at send-to-QC. RELATIONSHIP: 1 PO : N PRD (N=line count) : M Batch (M≥N, +1 per rework run). entity-status-map.md contains: 11 entities each with own statuses/role-who-changes/mockup-page/doc-format/when-created; a 17-row cascade table; a single-line end-to-end text diagram (customer→PO→PRD→Batch→QC→Shipment/DN→Invoice→Paid); a mockup-conformance check (2 UX fixes: PRD numbering format PRD-000091→PRD-{YYYYMM}-{NNNNNN}; po-detail should show PRD per line) — flagged as fix list, did not edit mockups. Synced status-journeys.md §3 (renamed to PRD + Batch, added relationship + pointer to entity-status-map.md as single source of truth). 3 lifecycle questions batched to Pond with defaults (not blocking). Feature-level status unchanged (Gate 1 round 4 still open).
